analysis.reason: 来自Simon Willison博客，属于中高可信来源；内容关于MCP的核心价值，但只是单一评论观点，需要更多验证。；今日新内容偏少，从近期缓存中补入供回看。
analysis.summary_cn: Sean Lynch 指出 MCP 的核心价值在于将认证流程隔离出 agent 的上下文窗口，甚至完全脱离 agent 框架。他设想 MCP 的理想形态可能只是一个 API 认证网关，但这本身就是重大改进。

raw_summary:
The real valuable capability MCP offers over skills/CLI is isolating the auth flow outside of the agent’s context window, and potentially out of the harness completely. [...]

Maybe the idealized form of MCP is just an auth gateway for the API and nothing else. That’d still be a win.

— Sean Lynch, comment on Hacker News

Tags: ai, generative-ai, llms, model-context-protocol, skills
title: Quoting Sean Lynch

raw_summary:
What's changed
